name: Gloomhaven
description: A game of cooperative tactical combat set in a persistent dungeon-crawling world with over 95 unique missions.

name: Brass: Birmingham
description: Build networks, develop industries, and expand your empire during the industrial revolution in Birmingham.

name: Ark Nova
description: Plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support global conservation projects.

name: Pandemic Legacy: Season 1
description: A co-operative campaign game where each decision permanently changes the world you play in.

name: Spirit Island
description: Powerful island spirits cooperate to drive away colonizing invaders and protect the native islanders.

name: Terraforming Mars
description: Corporations compete to terraform Mars by raising temperature, oxygen, and ocean coverage.

name: Through the Ages: A New Story of Civilization
description: Build the greatest civilization through careful resource management, military strength, and cultural development.

name: Twilight Imperium (4th Edition)
description: An epic game of galactic conquest, politics, and trade where players compete to control the galaxy.

name: Scythe
description: An alternate-history 1920s game of engine-building and territorial control in Eastern Europe.

name: Gaia Project
description: Fourteen factions compete to colonize and terraform planets across the galaxy.

name: Dune: Imperium
description: Combine deck-building and worker placement in a struggle for the most valuable resource in the universe.

name: Root
description: A game of woodland might and right where asymmetric factions battle for control of a vast wilderness.

name: Wingspan
description: A competitive bird-collecting engine-building game with over 170 unique North American birds.

name: Brass: Lancashire
description: The original Brass. Build canals and railways to dominate the industrial revolution in Lancashire.

name: Twilight Struggle
description: Two players relive the Cold War, waging political battles across the globe for 45 years of history.

name: Agricola
description: Manage a farm in 17th-century Europe. Feed your family and expand your homestead.

name: Terra Mystica
description: Fourteen factions with unique abilities terraform a landscape to expand their dominion.

name: Concordia
description: Build a Roman trading empire across the Mediterranean using a hand of action cards.

name: Great Western Trail
description: Drive your cattle herd from Texas to Kansas City in the most profitable way possible.

name: Underwater Cities
description: Build the most efficient network of underwater cities on the ocean floor.

name: Barrage
description: Compete to build and manage the most powerful hydroelectric dam system in the Alps.

name: On Mars
description: Colonize Mars by contributing to the development of the first human settlement on the red planet.

name: Maracaibo
description: Sail the Caribbean Sea during the 17th century while completing quests and building influence.

name: Clans of Caledonia
description: Lead one of Scotland's historical clans during the 19th century transition from agriculture to industry.

name: Architects of the West Kingdom
description: Compete to be the best architect in the service of a monarch during the Carolingian Empire.

name: Viticulture: Essential Edition
description: Build the most successful winery in Tuscany by planting vines, harvesting grapes, and crafting wine.

name: Power Grid
description: Supply cities with power using various energy sources while managing a network of infrastructure.

name: Puerto Rico
description: Build your colonial plantation, produce goods, and ship them to Europe to score victory points.

name: Everdell
description: Build a city of critters and constructions beneath the Ever Tree in this beautiful engine-builder.

name: Cascadia
description: Build the most harmonious ecosystem in the Pacific Northwest by placing terrain tiles and wildlife tokens.

name: Catan
description: Collect resources, build roads and settlements, and trade with other players on the island of Catan.

name: Carcassonne
description: Place tiles to build medieval landscapes and claim features with your followers.

name: Ticket to Ride
description: Build railway routes across North America to connect cities and complete destination tickets.

name: Pandemic
description: Four diseases threaten the world. Work together as a team to find cures before it is too late.

name: 7 Wonders
description: Lead one of seven great ancient cities and develop your civilization through cards drafted each round.

name: Dominion
description: The game that launched deck-building. Acquire cards to build the most efficient deck and earn the most victory points.

name: Azul
description: Draft colorful tiles to decorate the walls of the Royal Palace of Evora in this abstract strategy game.

name: Splendor
description: Collect gems, acquire cards, and attract noble patrons to build the greatest Renaissance gem-trading empire.

name: 7 Wonders Duel
description: Two players compete to build the greatest ancient civilization in this card-drafting civilization game.

name: Codenames
description: Two rival spymasters know the secret identities of 25 agents. Their teammates know only the codenames.

name: Patchwork
description: Two players compete to build the most aesthetic quilt by fitting oddly shaped patches together.

name: Dixit
description: Use beautifully illustrated cards and creative storytelling to give clues that are not too obvious nor too cryptic.

name: Camel Up
description: Bet on crazy camels stacking on each other and racing around a pyramid in the Egyptian desert.

name: Sushi Go!
description: Pass cards around the table and grab the best sushi dishes as they whiz by in this drafting game.

name: Hanabi
description: A cooperative card game where players hold cards facing outward and must give each other hints.

name: Forbidden Island
description: Work together as a team of adventurers to capture four sacred treasures before the island sinks.

name: One Night Ultimate Werewolf
description: In this fast game, each player takes on a secret role and tries to figure out who the werewolf is.

name: Citadels
description: Use your characters' special abilities to build the most glorious city while thwarting your rivals.

name: Coup
description: Bluff your way to victory by eliminating all other players in this fast-paced social deduction card game.

name: Alchemists
description: Deduce the hidden properties of magical ingredients and publish your research before rivals discredit you.

name: Keyflower
description: Bid workers to claim tiles and build your village across four seasons in this unique auction game.

name: Food Chain Magnate
description: Build a fast food empire from scratch in this highly strategic game of corporate competition.

name: Mage Knight
description: Explore a land of ancient runes, creatures, and powers in this epic solo or cooperative adventure.

name: Robinson Crusoe
description: Survive on a deserted island by building shelter, finding food, and fending off dangers.

name: Eldritch Horror
description: Investigators travel the globe to gather clues and close gates in this Lovecraftian adventure.

name: Cosmic Encounter
description: Build a galactic empire by establishing colonies on other players' planets using alien powers.

name: Caverna: The Cave Farmers
description: Dwarves mine and farm in a mountain cave, building rooms and raising animals to prosper.

name: Ora et Labora
description: Run a monastery in medieval Europe, producing goods and constructing buildings over centuries.

name: Nusfjord
description: Run a fishing company in a small Norwegian village, developing your fleet and the local community.

name: Lorenzo il Magnifico
description: Lead a noble family in Renaissance Florence, acquiring resources and gaining prestige.

name: Res Arcana
description: Draft magical artifacts and use essence to power them in this streamlined engine-building card game.

name: Sleeping Gods
description: Captain a steamship lost in a strange world, exploring an atlas and discovering dozens of quests.

name: Heat: Pedal to the Metal
description: Race vintage cars at breakneck speeds using hand management and engine-building mechanics.

name: Sky Team
description: Two players fly as a pilot and co-pilot team and must land their aircraft through silent cooperation.

name: Beyond the Sun
description: Civilizations of the future compete to colonize new worlds and advance their technology.

name: Foundations of Rome
description: Acquire plots and erect grand buildings to shape the Eternal City into a glorious metropolis.

name: Revive
description: Rebuild humanity after an ice age by exploring a frozen world and restarting ancient machines.

name: Gloomhaven: Jaws of the Lion
description: A standalone entry into the Gloomhaven universe designed to be more accessible for new players.

name: Pandemic Legacy: Season 2
description: Continue the story of Pandemic Legacy in a desperate fight to save a world already ravaged by disease.

name: Pandemic Legacy: Season 0
description: Prequel to Pandemic Legacy. Play as CIA operatives trying to prevent a global bio-terrorism attack.

name: Suburbia
description: Build a borough of a major city by playing hex tiles representing commercial, residential, and civic areas.

name: Lords of Waterdeep
description: Recruit adventurers and send them on quests to increase your power in the Forgotten Realms city of Waterdeep.

name: Tzolk'in: The Mayan Calendar
description: Place workers on interlocking gears that turn each round, creating unique timing decisions.

name: Mysterium
description: One player is a ghost sending cryptic visions to psychic investigators trying to solve a murder mystery.

name: Aeon's End
description: Cooperatively defend the last city of Gravehold from devastating breaches and powerful nemeses.

name: Azul: Stained Glass of Sintra
description: Create the most beautiful stained glass windows for the Palace of Sintra in this sequel to Azul.

name: Clank! In! Space!
description: Sneak through a spaceship, steal artifacts, and escape before the alarm triggers in this deck-builder.

name: Pandemic: Reign of Cthulhu
description: Seal portals, stop cultists, and prevent the awakening of the Old Ones in this Lovecraftian Pandemic.

name: Mechs vs. Minions
description: League of Legends characters pilot mechs in a cooperative campaign of increasingly epic proportions.

name: The Crew: The Quest for Planet Nine
description: A cooperative trick-taking card game where players must complete 50 increasingly difficult missions.

name: Clank!
description: Sneak into a dungeon, grab as much loot as you can, and escape before the dragon gets you.

name: Paleo
description: Cooperatively help a group of early humans survive the Stone Age by mastering different skill sets.

name: Wayfarers of the South Tigris
description: Embark on a journey of exploration and cartography during the Golden Age of Islam.

name: Pandemic: Fall of Rome
description: Prevent the fall of the Roman Empire by fighting off barbarian tribes threatening its borders.

name: Endeavor: Age of Sail
description: Build trade routes, occupy cities, and accumulate industry, culture, and wealth across the globe.

name: Agricola: All Creatures Big and Small
description: A two-player version of Agricola focused entirely on animal husbandry and farm development.

name: Tigris & Euphrates
description: Reiner Knizia's classic abstract strategy game of civilization building in ancient Mesopotamia.

name: Acquire
description: Merge hotel chains and invest wisely to build the most valuable portfolio in this classic board game.

name: Samurai
description: Place tiles to surround castles, Buddhas, and rice paddies to win the favour of feudal Japan.

name: War of the Ring (Second Edition)
description: One player controls the Fellowship of the Ring, the other commands the forces of Sauron.

name: Quantum
description: Colonize the universe by deploying fleets and using quantum entanglement to your advantage.

name: Sid Meier's Civilization: A New Dawn
description: Lead one of history's greatest civilizations from antiquity to the information age.

name: Letters from Whitechapel
description: One player is Jack the Ripper trying to evade capture while others play as investigators hunting him down.

name: Suburbia: Collector's Edition
description: An expanded edition of Suburbia with additional tiles, challenge cards, and borders for your borough.

name: Arkham Horror (3rd Edition)
description: Investigators explore a city of eldritch horror seeking clues to stop an Ancient One from awakening.

name: The Voyages of Marco Polo
description: Travel the Silk Road from Venice to the court of Kublai Khan, trading and gaining wealth.

name: Diplomacy
description: The classic game of negotiation and betrayal set in pre-World War I Europe. No dice, just cunning.

name: Race for the Galaxy
description: Build a galactic civilization by exploring star systems, developing technologies, and settling worlds.

name: Camel Up (Second Edition)
description: Bet on camel races around a pyramid in this updated edition with new mechanics and components.

name: Pandemic: Iberia
description: Fight five diseases in 19th-century Iberian Peninsula, limited by historical technology of the era.

name: Coup
description: In a dystopian future, bluff and scheme to be the last player with influence in the government.
